name: Vanometric Superconductor
desc: Experimental flux dissipation materials and technologies allow this ship to get above and beyond its baseline potential. Increases flux dissipation by flat %s points.

name: Battlecarrier Logistics
desc: Advanced hangar bay facilities allow this ship to reduce fighter replacement time by %s. However, the machinery is calibrated for the use of fighters, reducing the OP cost for fighter wings by %s. This also results in OP cost increase by %s for support and bomber wings. Interceptors are unaffected.
